name: NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1
description_en: An open humanoid robot foundation model designed to accelerate skill learning, transfer, and deployment for physical AI systems.
description_zh: 面向 Physical AI 的开放人形机器人基础模型，用于加速技能学习、迁移与部署。
editorial_summary_zh: 把人形机器人训练、推理与仿真平台结合成了清晰的产品路线。
editorial_summary_en: Connects humanoid robot training, reasoning, and simulation into a coherent platform play.
